message:
test: ungate proptest_mission_robot_api (16 tests) and proptest_commit_phase (12 tests)

All imported types now exist in plan.rs and robot_types.rs.
Fixed proptest_commit_phase to match actual API: TxStep.ordinal is usize,
TxStep has description field, failure_boundary is Option<String> (step_id),
TxCommitStepOutcome::Failed has no error_code, receipts are serde_json::Value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
